news.headline: Publix declares Q3 2024 dividend of 10.75 cents/share on common stock to be paid on Aug 1, 2024. Stockholders as of July 15 eligible.
news.summary: A corporation situated in Lakeland, Fla., recently announced a quarterly dividend of 10.75 cents per share on its common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be paid out on Aug. 1, 2024, to stockholders of record as of the end of business on July 15, 2024. Shareholders have the option to receive the dividend either through direct deposit or a physical check in the mail. Interested individuals can choose the direct deposit method by visiting corporate.publix.com/stock and opting for Publix Stockholder Online at the bottom of the website.

news.headline: DataDome recognized as bot management platform leader with expansion into anti-fraud, including Ad Protect & Account Protect.
news.summary: DataDome, a prominent AI-driven platform for online fraud and bot management, has revealed its expansion beyond bot mitigation. The company has introduced Ad Protect and Account Protect to broaden its anti-fraud capabilities. This announcement was made on July 1, 2024, in New York. DataDome is recognized for its effective measures in combating fraudulent activities and managing bots, now further enhancing its offerings with the addition of Ad Protect and Account Protect.

news.headline: Meijer marks 90th anniversary with roots in Great Depression; started by barber Hendrik Meijer in 1934 with wife and kids.
news.summary: In July 1, 2024, Grand Rapids, Michigan, a local barber named Hendrik Meijer saw an opportunity during the Great Depression in 1934. Together with his wife Gezina and their children, 18-year-old Johanna and 14-year-old Fred, they opened Meijer's Grocery in Greenville, MI. This venture marked the humble beginnings of what would grow to become a successful retail chain.

news.headline: Global IoT Professional Service Market to grow from USD 124.1 billion in 2023 to USD 203.96 billion by 2031 at a CAGR of 6.4%.
news.summary: In Westford, Massachusetts on July 1, 2024, data from SkyQuest reveals that the global Internet of Things (IoT) Professional Service Market was valued at USD 116.7 billion in 2022. It is projected to increase to USD 124.1 billion in 2023 and further to USD 203.96 billion by 2031, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.4% during this period.

news.headline: Photoacoustic Imaging Market to grow from $80 million in 2024 to $105 million by 2029, with 5.5% CAGR. Drivers: investments, partnerships.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, it was reported that the worldwide photoacoustic imaging sector is expected to witness significant expansion, increasing from USD 80 million in 2024 to USD 105 million by 2029 at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.5%. Contributing factors to this growth are the increasing investment in imaging technology and the formation of strategic partnerships within the industry. However, notable challenges include high competition and the need for continued technological advancements.

news.headline: Inventors from Warren, Mich, develop the SNOW AWAY snow shovel for easier snow clearing without lifting.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Pittsburgh, two inventors from Warren, Michigan, introduced the SNOW AWAY, a novel shovel design aimed at revolutionizing snow removal. The inventors believed in the concept of pushing snow instead of lifting and throwing it, to simplify clearing efforts on sidewalks. This innovative product is set to streamline snow removal processes, potentially reducing the time and energy required for the task. The SNOW AWAY offers a promising solution for improving efficiency during winter weather conditions, with its unique design and functionality.

news.headline: Mastercam releases version 2025 with advanced features for efficient machining. Updates promise speed, precision.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Tolland, Connecticut, Mastercam, a top provider of CAD/CAM solutions, revealed the launch of Mastercam 2025. The updated version offers innovative features and improvements aimed at optimizing machining performance in terms of speed, efficiency, and precision.

news.headline: WiMi announced a new blockchain consensus mechanism based on distributed consistency and hash entropy. Nasdaq: WIMI.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Beijing, WiMi Hologram Cloud Inc. (NASDAQ: WIMI) disclosed its development of a blockchain consensus mechanism. This mechanism is founded on enhanced distributed consistency and hash entropy. WiMi is renowned as a top global Hologram Augmented Reality Technology supplier.

news.headline: Discover Puerto Rico and Van Leeuwen collaborate for Piña Colada's 70th anniversary, offering exclusive ice cream in NYC on July 10.
news.summary: On July 10th, 2024, Discover Puerto Rico, the Island's Destination Marketing Organization, will be teaming up with the Van Leeuwen Ice Cream Truck to offer free scoops of their exclusive Piña Colada Ice Cream in NYC to celebrate Piña Colada Day. Residents and visitors alike can enjoy this special treat on that day.

news.headline: First-time visitor at Hard Rock Atlantic City wins $1,593,457 slot jackpot with $10 bet.Characters: 83
news.summary: A visitor from out-of-state recently hit the jackpot at Hard Rock Hotel & Casino Atlantic City, scoring an impressive $1,593,457.33 on a winning slot machine. The fortunate player, making their first visit to the casino, placed a $10 bet on the Wheel of Fortune game. This significant win was through a wide area progressive jackpot. The exciting news was shared on July 1, 2024.

news.headline: European markets surge post French election; far-right party wins 33% of vote, Macron's alliance places third with 20%. Fin optimism from inflation data in Germany.
news.summary: European financial markets reacted positively to the first round of the French legislative elections as the far-right National Rally party, led by Marine Le Pen and Jordan Bardella, won with 33% of the vote, falling short of an absolute majority. The New Popular Front, an alliance of left-wing parties, secured second place with 28%, while President Macron's centrist coalition came in third with 20%. Macron dissolved the French Parliament on June 9 after the European parliamentary elections. The results eased concerns about government spending and potential interest-rate cuts by the European Central Bank due to lower-than-expected inflation in Germany. This setback for Macron, in power since 2017, has sparked optimism in financial markets.

news.headline: Chewy stocks jump as Keith Gill reveals ownership incl. significant shares.
TouchTunes partners with Lucra for bar patrons to compete for cash or credit prizes playing electronic darts, launching FunWallet soon.
news.summary: In New York City, TouchTunes Music Company, LLC has revealed a groundbreaking collaboration with Lucra, a top technology provider for gamification services. TouchTunes, the largest interactive music and entertainment platform in North America, will introduce the FunWallet mobile integration through this exclusive partnership. Scheduled to debut later in the year, this innovative feature will cater to millions of bar attendees nationwide, offering a safe and enjoyable way for individuals engaged in bar games like darts to compete with each other.

news.headline: Judge denies cancer victims' request to stop J&J bankruptcy plan over talc products lawsuit. $6.48B settlement plan disrupted.
news.summary: A request by a group of cancer victims to halt Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) from proceeding with their proposed bankruptcy settlement has been denied by a federal judge. The settlement is designed to address over tens of thousands of lawsuits alleging that the company's talc products, such as baby powder, contain cancer-causing asbestos. The cancer victims had sought a preliminary order on June 11 in New Jersey to stop J&J from declaring bankruptcy outside the state in order to disrupt the $6.48 billion settlement plan. However, U.S. District Judge Michael Shipp rejected the request, stating that he could not issue the motion as the potential harm to the victims was merely speculative. The judge pointed out that he did not have the authority to settle disputes over the matter.

news.headline: Winner of Student of the Year Award at 2024 Empowering Scholars Summit by Native Forward Scholars Fund recognized.
news.summary: Distinguished scholars honored for their dedication to Native achievement and impact both on and off the university grounds. The Native Forward Scholars Fund, a leading contributor of scholarships to Native students, has revealed the recipients of the 2023 awards in Albuquerque, New Mexico, as of July 1, 2024.

news.headline: May saw a significant decline in construction spending, surpassing predictions.
Hero MotoCorp honors founder Dr. Brijmohan Lall Munjal with 'The Centennial' motorcycle. Tribute to legacy.
news.summary: Hero MotoCorp in India is honoring its Founder Chairman, Dr. Brijmohan Lall Munjal, with a special collector's edition motorcycle called The Centennial. This tribute commemorates the legacy of Dr. Munjal, who played a key role in the company's success over the years. The release of The Centennial is a celebration of Hero MotoCorp's centenary milestone, marking a significant moment in the company's history. The limited-edition motorcycle is a symbol of the company's heritage and success, showcasing a unique design and features that pay homage to Dr. Munjal's vision. This special edition model is set to be a collector's item, with only a limited number being produced for avid fans and collectors.

news.headline: Jan Stieger joins the Board of Directors at Velocity Portfolio Group, Inc., as former Executive Director of RMAI.
news.summary: WALL, New Jersey - Velocity Portfolio Group, Inc., a prominent receivables management company, has appointed Jan Stieger, the former Executive Director of the Receivables Management Association International (RMAI), to its Board of Directors as an independent member. Jan led RMAI from 2011 until May 2024. She will join Chris DeCresce, Vice Chair of the Securities and Capital Markets division at Paul Hastings, as the company's second independent board member. This addition further strengthens the board by bringing in Jan's expertise gained over her tenure at RMAI, enhancing the company's strategic decision-making capabilities.

news.headline: OrthoLite expands in Europe, boosting production and innovation at OrthoLite Europa hub, enhancing manufacturing practices.
news.summary: OrthoLite, the leading provider of high-performance comfort footwear solutions, has revealed plans to expand its European hub, OrthoLite Europa (OEU). This move demonstrates the company's dedication to enhancing its global vertical integration strategy. Through investments in its facilities, OrthoLite aims to strengthen manufacturing practices and ensure consistency across its production sites. This expansion in Europe signifies OrthoLite’s commitment to delivering top-quality products and services to its customers worldwide.

news.headline: R.J. Reynolds Vapor introduces SENSA, zero nicotine option for consumers, with locking feature and battery take back program.
news.summary: R.J. Reynolds Vapor Company, a subsidiary of Reynolds American Inc., unveiled SENSA with a unique locking feature and battery recycling initiative on July 1, 2024, in Winston-Salem, North Carolina. This innovative product aims to enhance user experience and promote sustainability. RJRVC, under the BAT Group's U.S. arm, is leading the way with this advancement, showing their commitment to technological progress and environmental responsibility. The company is setting a new standard in the vaping industry, prioritizing safety and eco-conscious practices.

news.headline: Current sentiment in the cryptocurrency market is neutral with Fear and Greed Index at 53 out of 100.
Neutral on the Fear and Greed Index at 48 out of 100.
Inventor from Columbus, Ga. develops touch-free Automatic Toilet Tissue Dispenser (ACC-243) to boost sanitation.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 1, 2024, an inventor from Columbus, Georgia, announced the creation of the AUTOMATIC TOILET PAPER HOLDER. This innovation aims to provide a touch-free method of dispensing toilet paper in bathrooms. The inventor highlighted the increased sanitation and control benefits of the design. The invention has garnered attention for its potential to enhance hygiene practices.

news.headline: Global 5G IoT market was valued at $8.53B in 2022. Expected to grow from $12.96B in 2023 to $136.18B in 2031, with a CAGR of 34.12%.
news.summary: In Westford, Massachusetts, as of July 1, 2024, data from SkyQuest reveals that the global market for 5G Internet of Things (IoT) was valued at USD 8.53 billion in 2022. Projections indicate a steady growth trajectory, with an estimated increase to USD 12.96 billion in 2023 and a substantial rise to USD 136.18 billion by 2031. This surge reflects a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 34.12% expected during the forecast period spanning 2024 to 2031. The escalating adoption of 5G technology in IoT applications is a key driver underlying this market expansion.

news.headline: Global BYOD and Enterprise Mobility Market to reach $133.9 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 13.0% from 2024.
news.summary: According to a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™, the global size of the BYOD and Enterprise Mobility Market is estimated to increase from USD 72.7 billion in 2024 to USD 133.9 billion by 2029, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 13.0%.

news.headline: Partillion Bioscience partners with Sony to distribute Nanovial products in Japan for Sony's Flow Cytometry Instruments.
news.summary: In Japan, Sony is utilizing Nanovial Technology's compatibility with their flow cytometry instruments through distribution partnership with Partillion Bioscience Corporation, as revealed on July 1, 2024.

news.headline: BSV token listed on Orange Gateway and CoinDCX exchanges, expanding trading options for users.
news.summary: In Zug, Switzerland on July 1, 2024, the BSV Blockchain revealed that its token can now be traded on top digital currency exchanges Orange Gateway and CoinDCX. This move expands opportunities for buying, selling, and exchanging BSV for users.

news.headline: See's Candies® brings back Lollypalooza campaign with a new Lollypop flavor for National Lollypop Day. 13 year-round and seasonal flavors included.
news.summary: In San Francisco on July 1, 2024, See's Candies announced the return of their Lollypalooza campaign, a limited-time summer event showcasing a special assortment of 13 year-round and seasonal lollypops. This celebration by the renowned candy company offers customers the chance to enjoy unique flavors.

news.headline: Ruling on presidential immunity likely soon from Supreme Court.
Stocks and voting trends discussed on Bloomberg Surveillance show.
Macron and left-wing opponents team up to prevent Le Pen from securing a majority in the French election.
news.summary: A new study has found that the revenue of the global music industry reached $21.6 billion in 2020, with streaming services accounting for 83% of the total revenue. This represents a 7.4% increase from the previous year. Despite the challenges posed by the COVID-19 pandemic, the music industry continues to show resilience and growth. The study also highlighted that vinyl records saw a resurgence in popularity, with a 23.4% increase in sales compared to the previous year. Additionally, digital album sales declined by 3.8% in 2020. Overall, the music industry has adapted to changing consumer trends and technologies, positioning itself for further growth in the coming years.

news.headline: Surf legend Joel Tudor rejoins Birdwell as brand ambassador. Sponsorship announced on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Birdwell is excited to announce the return of esteemed longboarder Joel Tudor as their brand ambassador. The renowned American beach brand, recognized for its durable, artisanal boardshorts, revealed the news on July 1, 2024, in Irvine, California. This partnership marks Birdwell's official sponsorship of Tudor, emphasizing his significance within the surfing community.

news.headline: ISM reports manufacturers aren't contributing significantly to U.S. economic growth.
Retail operators from the US went on a trip to explore Fontina cheese in Italy, visiting pastures and production sites.
news.summary: From June 9 to 11, 2024, GDO operators from the US participated in a familiarization trip to explore the Fontina PDO territories in Milan. The trip featured visits to the mountain pastures and production sites of the renowned cheese. This initiative provided valuable insights for the participants and highlighted the unique qualities of Fontina PDO.

news.headline: McLaren Trophy America debuts in 2025 with 10 rounds at prominent US circuits like Indy Motor Speedway & Circuit of the Americas. Artura Trophy car featured.
news.summary: A new championship called McLaren Trophy America is set to launch with a total of 10 rounds scheduled. The championship will include races at prestigious tracks such as the Indianapolis Motor Speedway and Circuit of the Americas. It is worth noting that the series will support the GT World Challenge America powered by AWS. The highlight of the championship will be the use of a specially designed Artura Trophy race car that will be maintained and managed by independent race teams.

news.headline: Bank First implements UFS's Empowered Core Banking Platform, supporting growth - July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Bank First, based in Manitowoc, Wisconsin, disclosed on July 1, 2024, its adoption of the Empowered Core banking technology platform created by UFS, a renowned technology provider for community banks. This initiative, which involved utilizing cutting-edge technology, aims to facilitate Bank First's expansion efforts. The company's stock trades on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BFC.

news.headline: Comcast appoints Javier Garcia as Senior VP of Sales & Marketing in Central Division based in Atlanta, spanning 12 states.
news.summary: Comcast has appointed Javier Garcia as the Senior Vice President of Sales & Marketing for its Central Division, based in Atlanta, Georgia. In this position, Garcia will be responsible for leading sales and marketing efforts across a 12-state region, overseeing brand and product marketing, sales, and customer retention strategies. With almost ten years of experience at Comcast, Garcia brings a wealth of expertise to his new role.

news.headline: Quatrro named to the Channel Futures 2024 MSP 501 list, among world's top managed service providers.
news.summary: Quatrro Business Support Services (Quatrro) has recently been recognized as one of the leading managed service providers globally in the esteemed 2024 Channel Futures MSP 501 rankings. This list highlights the top companies in the industry, with Quatrro securing a notable position based on their exceptional services. This accolade emphasizes Quatrro's position as a premier player in the field, solidifying their reputation for excellence in managed services.

news.headline: California and Australia are partnering to trial sensors in the San Joaquin River Delta to monitor water quality.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, it was announced in San Francisco that a collaboration has been established between California and Australia to deploy unique sensors for monitoring water quality in the Sacramento-San Joaquin River Delta. This delta is vital for agriculture and ecology in the Bay Area. The sensors, created by CSIRO, will provide valuable data to help safeguard this important water body.

news.headline: DuPont to exhibit custom Kalrez parts at SEMICON West 2024, emphasizing on customer partnerships, supply assurance, innovation, and sustainability in the semiconductor sector. Event from July 9-11 in San Francisco. ($DD)
news.summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) reaffirms its commitment to showcasing successful customer partnerships, consistent supply, technological advancement, and environmental responsibility in the semiconductor sector at SEMICON West in San Francisco from July 9 to 11, 2024.

news.headline: T-Mobile ranked first in overall network experience metrics in Opensignal's report, with fastest 5G download speeds.
news.summary: Bellevue, Washington - T-Mobile, trading under NASDAQ as TMUS, has emerged as the leading 5G network in the United States, according to Opensignal’s latest report. The company secured the top position for all network experience metrics, showcasing its dominance in the industry. T-Mobile has not only achieved the fastest 5G download speeds but also excelled in various other aspects of network performance. This achievement positions T-Mobile ahead of its competitors, making it the most decorated 5G network in the country.

news.headline: U.S. stocks extend first-half gains, with Dow increasing by 210 points. Live updates available.
Poland to offer subsidies on expensive mortgages amidst economic recovery with increasing interest rates.
Cosmo Prof® hosts Second Annual Iconic Blonde Virtual Event for beauty professionals to learn latest blonding techniques. Register now!
news.summary: At Cosmo Prof's Iconic Blonde Virtual Event, stylists have the opportunity to enhance their skills in balayage, achieve stunning lived-in and beachy tones, and master the popular money piece technique. Registration is open for the event, where participants can learn the newest blonding techniques. This annual event offers stylists a chance to unlock their artistry in creating beautiful blonde looks.

news.headline: Fannie Mae released its 2023 Corporate Responsibility and Impact Report, previously known as ESG, highlighting actions and innovations.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Fannie Mae (OTCQB: FNMA) issued its 2023 Corporate Responsibility and Impact (CRI) Report in Washington. This report, formerly named the Environmental, Social, and Governance Report, outlines Fannie Mae's initiatives and advancements. The CRI Report showcases the company's efforts in different areas and demonstrates its commitment to corporate responsibility.

news.headline: Bloomberg reports on the latest sector and industry performance data. Keep up with the trends!

Global Application Security Market set to reach $55.0 billion by 2029, with CAGR of 10.3%, driven by tech giants like IBM, HCL, Synopsys, Microfocus, and Capgemini. Rising cyber threats, use of cloud-based technologies, and adoption of AI and machine learning contribute to market growth. Budget constraints and ROI concerns act as restraints. In-depth report available on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: The global Application Security Market is projected to increase from USD 33.7 billion in 2024 to USD 55.0 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 10.3%. This growth is driven by the escalating cyber threats targeting cloud-based applications and APIs, as well as the heightened reliance on applications. Key drivers include the rise in security breaches, while opportunities lie in the adoption of AI and machine learning. However, budget constraints and ROI concerns act as restraints. Noteworthy companies in the market include IBM, HCL, Synopsys, and Cloudflare. The surge in mobile and cloud-based technologies has necessitated enhanced security measures, leading to a rise in favorable government regulations and compliance mandates. The OWASP ASVS Project provides guidelines for secure web application development to mitigate risks. Market dynamics and trends underpin the growth and evolution of the Application Security industry.

news.headline: Global cardiac mapping market to reach USD 5.5 billion by 2034, exhibiting 5.8% CAGR. North America leads with advanced technology.
news.summary: The global cardiac mapping market was valued at US$3 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach US$5.5 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 5.8% between 2024-2034. This market is driven by technological advancements and the rising prevalence of cardiovascular diseases, particularly atrial fibrillation and other arrhythmias. Innovations in cardiac mapping systems, such as 3D electroanatomic mapping, are enhancing diagnostic accuracy and treatment effectiveness. The market is also seeing increased adoption of minimally invasive procedures, fueled by advancements in catheter technology. North America leads the market due to high healthcare expenditure and advanced infrastructure. The urgent need for advanced diagnostic tools for cardiovascular diseases, the increasing aging population, and the growing emphasis on research and development in healthcare are key factors propelling the growth of the cardiac mapping market.

news.headline: Forum Brands acquires EVER Skincare from Stella & Dot Brands, expanding in health & wellness sector.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Forum Brands, a company specializing in consumer brands for families, revealed its acquisition of EVER from Stella & Dot Brands. EVER, renowned for its clean skincare products, utilizes the patented LSR10 to deliver high-quality results. This acquisition marks an important move in the industry, emphasizing Forum Brands' commitment to expanding its portfolio.

news.headline: Tempest and SnapSea partner to boost destination marketing with user-generated content solutions. Philadelphia, July 1, 2024.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed to improve destination marketing efforts and increase user engagement to attract more visitors. Tempest, a prominent company specializing in website, digital marketing, and software solutions for destination marketing, is at the forefront of this initiative. The collaboration aims to leverage advanced user-generated content solutions to enhance overall marketing strategies. This development comes as of July 1, 2024, in Philadelphia, signaling a new era in boosting visitation numbers and promoting destinations effectively.
